verdict: Wayback CDX spike SUCCEEDED for 2016 ratings.

comparison_to_backfilled_wikipedia_at_T_.interpretation: Wayback covers ~all 435 districts vs Wikipedia back-filled covers ~58. Of 56 overlapping districts, 40 have different ratings -- confirms back-fill leakage was material, not theoretical.

integration_status: Spike complete; raw HTML and parsed parquets cached at data/raw/wayback_cook/. Full integration into features.py deferred to a Phase 9 follow-up - the cached data is the next session's starting point.
follow_up_work: Add ingest/wayback_cook.py module wrapping this spike parser
Modify features.py to prefer Wayback ratings over Wikipedia for BACKFILLED_CYCLES
Re-bake 2014/2016/2018 features parquets with Wayback ratings
Re-run headline backtest with no-leak training set; report numbers
